title: Tactical Trial: State-Actor Defense
success_message: Strategic victory. You successfully repelled a multi-vector state-sponsored campaign while maintaining continuity of operations.

steps.scenario: Sentinel detects a synchronized 'Low-and-Slow' brute force across multiple edge routers. Concurrent signals from TITAN indicate a zero-day exploit attempt on the policy engine's cryptographic module.

options.text: Rotate all edge cryptographic keys and immediately elevate posture to RED.
options.outcome: Brute force defeated. Attackers lose access as TITAN isolates the zero-day payload.

options.text: Deploy a decoy 'Internal' network segment to capture attacker tools.
options.outcome: Intelligence gathered, but attackers gain temporary foothold on legacy subsystems.

options.text: Block all inbound traffic from suspected ASNs and maintain AMBER posture.
options.outcome: Traffic blocked, but attackers switch to non-listed proxy nodes and resume the zero-day attack.

steps.scenario: The adversary pivots to a 'supply chain' attack, impersonating a vendor authorized under the Two-Person Rule. They request an emergency policy modification.

options.text: Strictly enforce the Two-Person cryptographic verification and ignore the urgency.
options.outcome: Attack neutralized. The adversary cannot provide the second valid signature.

options.text: Bypass one signature due to 'Operational Emergency' as declared by the vendor.
options.outcome: CATASTROPHIC FAILURE. Adversary modifies the policy pack to allow direct TITAN access. System compromised.

options.text: Temporarily lock the policy engine and initiate a full vendor audit.
options.outcome: Attack delayed, but vendor connectivity is severed during a critical period.
